blended.narrative: Killington is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,357 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
